author: NellowTCS
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Automatically creates backlinks from and to notes with easy customizability.

manifest.description: Automatically creates backlinks from and to notes with easy customizability.

name: Autolink

releases.author: NellowTCS
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- The majority of the plugin was revamped and made better and cleaner

* docs: add JoonasBjork as a contributor for bug by @allcontributors[bot] in https://github.com/NellowTCS/Obsidian-AutoLink/pull/7


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NellowTCS/Obsidian-AutoLink/compare/1.0.2...1.0.3
releases.name: 1.0.3 - ReLink

releases.author: NellowTCS
releases.description:
I've been rather busy, so not much has happened with this plugin.
That'll change now! This release is just fixing a weird bug with BRAT downloading.

## What's Changed
* docs: add Moyf as a contributor for bug by @allcontributors[bot] in https://github.com/NellowTCS/Obsidian-AutoLink/pull/3

## New Contributors
* @allcontributors[bot] made their first contribution in https://github.com/NellowTCS/Obsidian-AutoLink/pull/3

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NellowTCS/Obsidian-AutoLink/compare/1.0.1...1.0.2
releases.name: 1.0.2 - BRAT Bug Fixes

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Fixes 
- #1: Fix backspace/delete reverting the text after typing after a backlink rather than deleting the typed text.
- Stop suggestions popup showing up on Autonomous mode

## Broken/Missing
- Due to the way the backlink checking is working, a configuration option would be a bit hacky and could break easily. I'll try to refactor that.



**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NellowTCS/Obsidian-AutoLink/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1
releases.name: v1.0.1 - Bug Fixes

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: The first release of the plugin!
releases.name: v1.0.0 - First Release
